gate_type: planning-only Azure readiness dossier + cost/governance architecture
ready_for_slava_manual_retest_reason: planning-only gate; no product/runtime change; next action is Slava manual Azure account + budget setup
scope_summary: Produce a complete, interview-grade Azure deployment plan (service matrix, target architecture, cost model + guardrails, Slava manual checklist, 7-gate sequence, interview story) for a production-shaped deployment at ~$5-10/month. No Azure login, no resources, no deploy, no secrets, no source commit/push.

source_repo.working_tree_status: 4 new untracked azure planning docs + test-results/.last-run.json; 0 staged; no commit/push

repo_readiness.frontend: Vite SPA -> static dist/ => Static Web Apps (gap: staticwebapp.config.json)
repo_readiness.backend: .NET 9 single Api host referencing 6 service libs in-proc (microservice-shaped modular monolith) => 1 Container App scale-to-zero (gap: Dockerfile)
repo_readiness.config: IConfiguration; conn-string + DEEPSEEK_API_KEY via env (never logged); appsettings.json clean => Key Vault + Managed Identity
repo_readiness.ai_mode: IAiProvider Mock default / DeepSeek opt-in disabled => Azure OpenAI provider behind same seam, manual (gate 6)
repo_readiness.db_mode: SQL Server LocalDB, 6 schemas, DbMigrator => Azure SQL Serverless auto-pause, connection-string swap only (gate 4)

azure_architecture.public_layer: Static Web Apps CDN SPA — no backend/DB/AI on anonymous load
azure_architecture.auth_layer: SWA built-in auth / Entra External ID — compute+AI only after login
azure_architecture.api_layer: Container Apps insurance-api, minReplicas=0, cold-start on first authed call
azure_architecture.microservices: insurance-api (monolith now) + ai-worker (split later) + cleanup-job (ACA Job cron)
azure_architecture.cleanup: Blob lifecycle TTL + cleanup-job + SQL auto-pause
azure_architecture.observability: App Insights/Monitor/Log Analytics, sampling + 30-day retention + daily cap (free <5GB)
azure_architecture.ai_services: Azure OpenAI/Foundry + Document Intelligence F0 + AI Search Free — manual-trigger, token/page caps, Mock default, advisory-only + audit
azure_architecture.ci_cd: GitHub Actions build/test/containerize/deploy via OIDC federated identity (no stored secret)
azure_architecture.aks: DEFERRED — 24/7 node cost; ACA delivers scale-to-zero at $0 idle; AKS = real-scale/multi-team answer only

cost_model.alerts: $5/$10/$20/$30/$50 — NOTIFY only, do not stop resources
mitigations: Document Intelligence F0 + AI Search Free tiers

required_manual_steps: select subscription (do not paste its id)
choose + record region (West/North Europe or East US)
ensure GitHub repo reachable for OIDC
do_not_do_yet: az login outside an explicit deploy gate

AZURE_IAC_SKELETON_V0.1 — Bicep + Dockerfile + CI + commit azure docs/IaC to dev; no apply

AZURE_SQL_SERVERLESS_INTEGRATION_V0.1 — auto-pause SQL + Key Vault + Managed Identity; connection-string swap
AZURE_AI_CONTROLLED_DEMO_V0.1 — governed real AI behind a button; Mock stays default
limitations: 4 local azure docs are uncommitted (per gate); committed in AZURE_IAC_SKELETON_V0.1
cost figures are list-price estimates for a tiny workload; verify against the live budget after gate 3
